regions.text: These are answers to questions on pages 31, 32, and 33. This page is page 34.
Page 31
It is a house.
It is a ship.
It is a table.
It is a bottle.
It is a leg.
It is an arm.
It is a leg of a table.
It is an arm of a seat.
Page 32
They are three men. That is a woman.
They are glasses. That is a glass.
They are fingers. That is the thumb.
They are windows. That is a door.
They are houses. That is a street.
It is a picture of a man and a house. That is the frame of the picture. (Its frame)
They are feet. That is a foot.
That is a room A table is in it.
Page 33
Yes, it is.
Yes, he is.
No, it is not. It is on the floor.
No, it is not. It is on the floor.
No. It is in the man's hand.
No, it is not in the glass.
No. It is on the water.
Yes, they are at the door.
